summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival at Ferrari injects fresh momentum into the Scuderia's championship challenge after weeks of self-doubt plagued the Italian team. McLaren's resurgent pace threatens to splinter the title fight into a three-way battle, forcing Ferrari and Mercedes to execute flawless strategy on Spa's high-speed straights. A victory for Hamilton would signal Ferrari's momentum shift is genuine, while a McLaren triumph could establish them as genuine championship contenders heading into the season's second half.
